creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 172912
lr.shar

lr is a tool for generating file listings, which includes the best
features of ls(1), find(1), stat(1) and du(1).

WWW: https://github.com/chneukirchen/lr/

Poudriere ok (FreeBSD 9.3/i386 and FreeBSD 10.2/amd64)
Portlint ok

The lrocate script needs sysutils/xe from bug 211323.
